case_title: PAN, BO CHUN VS RUSSELL WAHL & COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $916.00 FILED BY PAN, BO CHUN AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSELL WAHL & COMPANY LEE, KIM HONG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-05-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, KIM HONG
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSELL WAHL & COMPANY LEE, KIM HONG THE PARTIES HAVE SETTLED THIS MATTER PURSUANT TO A WRITTEN SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT PAID THE SETTLEMENT AMOUNT TO PLAINTIFF IN CASH IN OPEN COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT MAIL SENT TO GO, MONIQUE-AGENT FOR SERVICE FRO RUSSEL WAHL & COMPANY RETURNED SIGNED
